scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @diffriendtiate/server && npm run build --workspace @diffriendtiate/client
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace @diffriendtiate/server && npm run build --workspace @diffriendtiate/client
scripts.test: npm run test:build && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:ai && npm run test:performance && npm run test:security && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: vitest run --config tests/vitest.config.mts tests/unit tests/components && npm run test:run --workspace @diffriendtiate/client
scripts.test:security:external: npm run test:security:audit && npm run test:security:zap
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run typecheck --workspace @diffriendtiate/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @diffriendtiate/client
